build.beforeDevCommand: cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --target-dir src-tauri/runner-target --bin typing-runner --features runner-binary && pnpm dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: pnpm build && cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --target-dir src-tauri/runner-target --release --bin typing-runner --features runner-binary && node scripts/prepare-sidecar.mjs
